scripts.start: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 5000 --directory dist
scripts.test: node --check supabase/functions/processEntryFee.js supabase/functions/processWithdrawal.js && node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const sql = readFileSync('supabase/schema.sql', 'utf8'); if (!sql.includes('green_acc_deals')) throw new Error('Supabase schema missing green_acc_deals table'); if (!sql.includes('entry_fee_status')) throw new Error('Schema missing entry_fee_status field'); console.log('Validation passed');"
